title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an AI-driven video generation system using Claude Code and related tools that automates the entire production pipeline from idea or URL to finished video. The workflow leverages Archon as a workflow harness and HyperFrames as the video generation framework, eliminating the need for human editors, animators, or voice actors.
